verses.text: Tua ciangin Tuuno in tua ciamtehna sagih sung panin khat a hon'khiat ka mu hi. Tua laitakin ganhing lite sung panin khat in vanging bangin nakpi takin, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi
Ka khuadak leh sakol kang khat hong pai a, a tungah a tuangpa in thal khat a tawi hi. Ama tungah lukhu khat kipia a, a gualzopa hihna tawh a gualzo dingin a kuankhia hi
Ciamtehna a nihna a hon' ciangin ganhing a nihna in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi

Sakol a ausan khat hong pai a, mite khatlekhat a kithah theihna dingun a sakol tung tuangpa in leitungah galkidona a pian'sak theihna ding vangliatna kipia a, ama tungah namsau lian mahmah khat zong kipia lai hi
Ciamtehna a thumna a hon' ciangin ganhing a thumna in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi. Sakol vom khat hong pai ka mu a, a tungah a tuangpa in a khutah tawitehna a tawi hi

Tua ganhing lite lak panin awging bang khat ka za a, “Mangbuh lawhta khat in ni khat tha man a, mangbuhham lawhta thum in ni khat tha mah man hi. Ahi zongin oliv huan leh leenggui huan susia kei in,” a ci hi
Ciamtehna a lina a hon' ciangin ganhing a lina in, “Hong pai in,” a cihna ka za hi

Ka khuadak leh sakol puang khat ka mu a, a tungah a tuangpa' min pen Sihna hi a, a nungah Hell in a zui hi. Amaute in namsau, kialpi, pulnatna, leh gamsate tawh leitung mi sehlisuah sehkhat a thahtheihna dingun thu a kipia hi
Ciamtehna ngana a hon' ciangin Pasian' thu a genna hang leh Pasian' thu citakin teci a pan'na uh hangin a kithat mite' kha, biakna tau nuai-ah a om ka mu hi

Amaute nakpi takin kiko uh a, “A thuman, a siangtho, a Vanglian Topa aw, leitungah a omlai, kote a hong that mite tungah cik ciangin thu khenin, kote hong thahna hangin cik ciangin phu la ding na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute tungah puantualpi a kang khat ciat kipia a, amaute a kithah mah bangin a kithat lai ding a naseppihte uh leh a sanggamte uh a kim matengin tawlkhat sung a tawlngak laina ding uh kigen hi
Ciamtehna gukna a hon' ciangin ka khuadak leh nakpi takin zin hong ling a, ni pen puanvom bangin hong vomin, kha pen sisan bangin a hong san hi
Aksite ahih leh huihpi in theipuam a mutkhiat bangin van panin kia zaizai uh hi
Laidal a kizial bangin vanpi kizialin maimang a, mual leh tuikulhte khempeuh a omna uh panin maimangta hi
Tua ciangin leitung kumpite leh miliante, galkapmangte, mihaute leh mi vangliante, silate leh sila a hilote-a kipanin a kuamah peuh, mualtunga leihawmte sungah bu uh a
mualte leh suangtum lianpite kiangah, “Kote tungah hong kiasuk un la, tokhom tungah a tupa' maitang leh Tuuno' hehna panin kote hong liah un
Amaute' hehna hangin gimna hun hong tungta ahih manin kua in thuakzo ding ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi.
